ns0:entry.ns0:title: BerriAI/litellm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm
Language: python
Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Megatron-Bridge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Megatron-Bridge
Language: python
Training library for Megatron-based models with bidirectional Hugging Face conversion capability

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/skills
Language: python
AI agent skills published by NVIDIA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official
Language: python
Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ariadng/metatrader-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ariadng/metatrader-mcp-server
Language: python
Model Context Protocol (MCP) to enable AI LLMs to trade using MetaTrader platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: interviewstreet/hiring-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/interviewstreet/hiring-agent
Language: python
AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
Language: python
A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wshobson/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wshobson/agents
Language: python
Multi-harness agentic plugin marketplace for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, and Gemini CLI
